product_overview: A local-first AI-powered social media dashboard that lets users compose, schedule, and post content across platforms while managing AI agents and monitoring background tasks. The app includes an AI chat assistant for captioning and post suggestions, real-time notifications, and local session storage.
core_goals: Compose and schedule posts to multiple social platforms from a single dashboard
Use an AI assistant to craft captions, hashtags, and post improvements
Manage and control AI agents that automate content and workflow tasks
Monitor and manage background tasks and scheduled posts
Receive and respond to platform messages and notifications in-app

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Authenticate into the app and establish a local session to access protected pages and features.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email/username -> Fill password -> Submit login form -> See /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill email/username -> Fill password -> Submit login form -> See validation error for incorrect credentials

features.name: Dashboard: Compose & Schedule Posts
features.description: Create posts with AI assistance, select target platforms, upload media, preview per-platform output, and schedule posts for later delivery.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Start new post composition -> Use AI assistant suggestion for caption -> Edit caption -> Select target platforms -> Upload media files -> Set schedule time -> Confirm scheduling -> Navigate to /tasks -> See scheduled post listed
Navigate to /dashboard -> Start new post composition -> Attempt to schedule without selecting a platform -> See validation prompt to select at least one platform

features.name: AI Chat Assistant
features.description: Chat with the local AI agent to generate captions, get hashtag suggestions, and receive post improvement tips.
user_flows: Navigate to /chat -> Start new conversation with AI assistant -> Send message requesting caption ideas -> Receive AI reply with caption suggestions -> Copy or apply a suggestion into composer on /dashboard -> Navigate to /dashboard -> See applied caption in composition

features.name: Agent Management
features.description: View, inspect, and control AI agents that can run automated behaviors or assist with content tasks.
user_flows: Navigate to /agents -> View list of agents -> Open agent details -> Start agent -> Observe agent status change to running
Navigate to /agents -> View list of agents -> Open agent details -> Stop agent -> Observe agent status change to stopped

features.name: Task Execution & Monitoring
features.description: Monitor active background tasks and scheduled job execution, inspect logs, and manage running jobs.
user_flows: Navigate to /tasks -> View active tasks -> Select a task to inspect -> Review task logs -> Mark task as reviewed
Navigate to /tasks -> View active tasks -> Attempt to stop a running task -> Confirm task stops and is no longer listed as active

features.name: Notifications & Messaging
features.description: Receive platform messages and notifications, view unread items, and reply to direct messages from within the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /notifications -> View unread messages and alerts -> Open a message thread -> Compose reply -> Send reply -> See message appear in thread
Navigate to /notifications -> View unread messages -> Mark a message as read -> Observe unread count decrease

features.name: Settings & Preferences
features.description: Adjust application and user preferences, including local AI and automation settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Update a user preference (e.g., voice or display setting) -> Save changes -> See confirmation of updated preference
Navigate to /settings -> Change scheduling timezone -> Save changes -> Observe new timezone applied to scheduled items in /tasks
